case_title: CRISTINA CIUMAC ET AL VS. DISCOVER BANK

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [EVIN CULP ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT, DISCOVERY BANK] FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIUMAC, CRISTINA FARRE, CYRUS LA AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY CIUMAC, CRISTINA FARRE, CYRUS LA AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK AS TO PLAINTIFF CIUMAC, CRISTINA FARRE, CYRUS LA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2023 - CONTINUED PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM TO APR-17-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CRISTINA CIUMAC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CYRUS LA FARRE (HUSBAND) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EVIN CULP (VENDOR ANALYST). PLAINTIFF ALSO REQUESTS FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO PLAINTIFF CRISTINA CIUMAC IS NOT PRESENT DUE TO SICK ON TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEC-19-2022 HAS NO SIGNATURE. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
ORDER TO CONTINUE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SIGNATURE FOUND. SERVED DEC-16-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-05-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CRISTINA CIUMAC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CYRUS LA FARRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LA TOYA BOOSE. THE COURT RECEIVED 4 COPIES OF DEFENDANT EXHIBITS, AND THE PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THEY DID NOT RECEIVE A COPY AND THAT THE EXHIBITS IN COURT WERE TOO MUCH TO REVIEW AND THEREFORE REQUEST A CONTINUANCE. THE HONORABLE CHRISTOPHER HITE ALLOWS A CONTINUANCE FOR BOTH PARTIES TO EXCHANGE ALL EXHIBITS NO LATER THAN APRIL 28, 2023. PLAINTIFFS LEFT WITH (2) OF THE (4) DEFENDANT EXHIBITS SENT TO THE COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER HITE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIUMAC, CRISTINA FARRE, CYRUS LA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING, MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ORDER TO CONTINUE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK AS TO PLAINTIFF FARRE, CYRUS LA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2023 BY CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. PLAINTIFF CRISTINA CIUMAC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CYRUS LA FARRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LA TOYA BOOSE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER HITE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.
